description_long: This object is a vintage-style control cabinet, featuring a large, angled control panel filled with numerous switches, dials, indicator lights, and a single analog gauge. The main body is constructed from sturdy metal, with a matte, slightly worn finish, and is supported by two pedestal-like bases, each containing three drawers with visible handles. The central section houses a recessed keyboard, suggesting an interface for manual input. The control panel is densely populated with colored buttons and toggles, arranged in organized rows, and a small display or meter is present on the right side. The rear of the cabinet is plain and unadorned, with no visible access panels or ventilation grilles. The overall design is utilitarian, evoking mid-20th-century industrial or military equipment.
description: A robust, vintage control cabinet with a metal body, numerous switches, indicator lights, drawers, and a central keyboard, evoking classic industrial or military control panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full control panel with switches, lights, a gauge, keyboard, and drawers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled control panel and the depth of the cabinet's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid metal back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled panel and the cabinet's overall thickness.
